entry.title: New: RES25-059 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
TO RETAIN THE LEGAL SERVICES OF THOMPSON, COE, COUSINS & IRONS, LLP AS SPECIAL COUNSEL TO REPRESENT DEFENDANT ZANE DE CAMBRA IN THE LEGAL ACTION ENTITLED DIANN TAUA, ETAL, V. CITY AND COUNTY OF HONOLULU, ETAL.; CIVIL NO. 1CCV-23-0001436 KTM (CIR. CT.)

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
